arts.sum: Champions Manchester City were going for an unprecedented five in a row – and they sit 7th, having already lost double the amount of games they did in the whole of last season. If you’re reading this then you are likely in hope of getting a run down of some scintillating action from what is turning out to be a Premier League season like few others.
